_doc: National population-weighted municipality panel for the fortnightly sold-match sample (v3.1). The sampler allocates the ~1000 target across these munis by population (capped at each muni's live 14-day volume), and within each muni splits Hus vs Lägenhet by the natural live volume ratio (no per-type editing). Each muni carries its Booli areaId + Hemnet location_id so the existing /salda-primary matcher works. v1 = 11 munis with both IDs resolved (probe 2026-06-18); expand by appending entries. See .planning/phases/19-.../19-PANEL-NOTES.md.
_overlays_doc: REPORT-ONLY additive overlays (no scraping, no sampler change). Each overlay re-buckets sold_match rows whose booli_sold.municipality = match_muni AND descriptive_area ∈ descriptive_areas, as an EXTRA data point in the weekly Slack report (these rows ALSO stay in their muni/region totals — the accepted double-count). Booli area 143 'Stockholms innerstad' = 626 apt sales/14d ≈ 53% of Stockholm apartments, so the national Stockholm sample already carries ~160 inner-city rows/cohort for free. descriptive_areas are Booli descriptiveAreaName labels (refine from area-143 feed as needed). NOT charted.

_backfill_pending._note: Resolved Booli areaId but Hemnet location_id still needed (live /locations/show endpoint is Cloudflare-dead via Oxylabs — needs a raw-Oxylabs JSON helper). Adds Östergötland/mid-Sweden/Värmland/Halland + a northern city.
